pageDescription: Find the original value before a percentage increase, decrease, or when given a percentage of the original

descriptions.percentageOf: Find the original when you know a percentage of it equals the final value
descriptions.increase: Find the original value before a percentage increase was applied
descriptions.decrease: Find the original value before a percentage decrease was applied

messages.enterInformation: Enter the final value and percentage to calculate the original value

errors.finalValue: Please enter a valid final value
errors.percentage: Please enter a valid percentage (greater than 0)
errors.decreaseTooLarge: For decrease, percentage must be less than 100%

explanations.percentageOf: {{percentage}}% of the original value equals {{finalValue}}, so the original value is {{originalValue}}
explanations.increase: After a {{percentage}}% increase, the value became {{finalValue}}. The original value was {{originalValue}}
explanations.decrease: After a {{percentage}}% decrease, the value became {{finalValue}}. The original value was {{originalValue}}

tooltips.finalValue: The value after the percentage change has been applied
tooltips.percentage: The percentage that was applied (increase, decrease, or portion)
tooltips.calculationType: Select the type of reverse percentage calculation you need
